title: malus strepens
intro: Malus strepens, also known as the crabapple or mountain apple, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Malus strepens include its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Malus strepens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, and are traditionally used to soothe sore throats and alleviate respiratory congestion.
